info.title: Supplement Checker API
info.description: Supplement Checker API. Analyze supplement stacks for interactions, timing recommendations, and overdose risk. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Analyze supplement stacks for interactions, timing recommendations, and overdose risk.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
